limit_without_order_returns_unexpected_r: SELECT with LIMIT 1 without ORDER returned an arbitrary, incorrect row.
ranking_query_wrong_order: Ranking query ordered incorrectly, returning the wrong top-ranked entity.
count_query_missing_filter: COUNT query omitted necessary WHERE conditions, yielding wrong count.
missing_insert_mutation: Expected INSERT mutation was not performed; only a SELECT was executed.
sql_min_on_text_column: MIN aggregation applied to a TEXT column, causing lexical rather than numeric result.
no_final_answer_submitted: Agent failed to provide any final answer after executing queries.
count_query_case_mismatch: COUNT query used case-sensitive value causing incorrect tally.
final_answer_wrong_format: Final answer format does not match expected list/string format.
answer_missing_expected_row_hash: Final answer omitted the required row hash identifier.
update_without_verification: Performed UPDATE mutation but gave no verification or correct final answer.
wrong_arithmetic_result: Computed numerical difference incorrectly, leading to wrong final value.
incorrect_count_aggregation: Used an inappropriate counting method (e.g., COUNT DISTINCT) yielding a wrong total.
incorrect_update_condition: UPDATE statement's WHERE clause did not match the intended row, so no record was modified.
incorrect_aggregation_function: Used the wrong aggregation (e.g., SUM instead of expected operation) producing an incorrect result.
multiple_answers_returned: Returned more than one answer when only a single result was expected.
aggregation_wrong_column: Aggregated over the wrong column, leading to an inflated or incorrect total.
count_query_wrong_table: COUNT aggregation performed on an incorrect table, yielding a wrong total.
aggregation_using_constant_multiplier: Applied a constant multiplier to the total sum instead of per-row percentage, producing an incorrect aggregation result.
mutation_missing_row_hash_return: Performed a mutation but the final answer omitted the required row hash identifier.
aggregation_case_mismatch: String comparison in the query was case-sensitive, resulting in selection of wrong rows.
missing_expected_result_item: Query returned an incomplete set of rows, missing some expected items.
aggregation_missing_filter: Aggregation executed without the necessary WHERE filter, causing an incorrect average.
aggregation_incorrect_max_value: MAX aggregation produced an incorrect result, often due to improper handling of units or data types.
count_query_incorrect_result: COUNT query returned a wrong number because required filtering criteria were missing or mis‑specified.
ranking_result_wrong_field: Returned the model name instead of the quantity value when the task asked for the highest quantity.
